# 延伸阅读 {#sec-D}

少量高质量入口，供课后深化与迁移。可直接复用连享会既有资源。

## 连享会

- 连享会主页：<https://www.lianxh.cn>
- 现代 DID 估计量（CSDID 等，属高级班）：<https://www.lianxh.cn/details/1811.html>

## 主案例与扩展案例

- Lane, N. (2025). Manufacturing revolutions: Industrial policy and industrialization in
  South Korea. *QJE*, 140(3), 1683–1741. <https://doi.org/10.1093/qje/qjaf025>
- Akcigit, U., Grigsby, J., Nicholas, T., & Stantcheva, S. (2022). Taxation and innovation
  in the twentieth century. *QJE*, 137(1), 329–385. <https://doi.org/10.1093/qje/qjab022>

## 复现与 skills

- Harvard Dataverse：<https://dataverse.harvard.edu/>
- 开放 Agent Skills 标准：<https://agentskills.io>

<!-- TODO: 各讲定稿后补充按讲分组的延伸阅读；衔接高级班/论文班的"课后修行路线图" -->
